scripts.export-data: docker compose exec embedder python -c "from main import _do_export; print(_do_export())"
scripts.import-data: docker compose exec embedder python -c "from main import _do_import; print(_do_import())"
scripts.process-embeddings: docker compose exec embedder python -c "import httpx; print(httpx.post('http://localhost:8000/process').json())"
scripts.pull-ollama-model: docker compose --profile full exec ollama ollama pull gemma2:2b
